sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44726" key="eu)pelh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐπελής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πέλω</etym>) <sense id="n44726.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easy</tr_>, dub. in Orac. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:5:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
